---
title: Links with Parentheses
status: published
---

Links with parentheses in URLs, especially from Wikipedia disambiguation pages:

[Binary search (algorithm)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Binary_search_(algorithm))

[Object-oriented programming](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Object-oriented_programming_(OOP))

Nested parentheses: [Markdown (markup language)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Markdown_(markup_language))

Inline code reference to a URL-like pattern: `GET /api/users/(id)/profile`

Multiple links in sequence: [Douglas Crockford](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Douglas_Crockford) wrote the JSON standard, which is referenced in [JavaScript (programming language)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/JavaScript_(programming_language)).

A line with escaped parentheses in text: This library uses pattern \(like this\) for matching.

Links with query parameters and fragments:

[Search results](https://www.google.com/search?q=markdown+parser#results)

[Anchor link](https://example.com/docs#section-1-(introduction))

End of links test.
